intel.what: Celonis is a global leader in Process Intelligence and Process Mining technology, providing an enterprise SaaS platform that uses AI to optimize business processes.
intel.scale: large enterprise SaaS company (fastest-growing in its category)
talking_points: Demonstrate interest in AI-assisted demo workflows and process mining automation.
Highlight ability to translate complex business processes (e.g., supply chain, finance) into compelling stories.
Emphasize curiosity about both the technical and commercial sides of enterprise AI.

intel.what: Scalable Capital is a digital investment and banking platform with a full banking licence, serving over one million clients in Europe.
intel.language_culture: English (job posting and company values in English; offices in Germany, UK, Austria, Italy)
talking_points: Emphasize your strong attention to detail and ability to identify trends in HR data, aligning with their focus on data integrity and analytics.
Highlight any experience or coursework in automating People Operations workflows, as they value streamlining manual tasks.
Mention your interest in supporting HR metrics and dashboards to help track departmental performance, directly relevant to the role's responsibilities.

intel.what: Flix is a travel technology company that aims to make travel more accessible, sustainable, and affordable through AI-driven customer service automation.
talking_points: Highlight your ability to interview process owners and document actual workflows, including exceptions and workarounds.
Emphasize comfort with data-driven analysis using process mining tools like Celonis to identify automation opportunities.
Show your skill in translating business rules into precise decision tables that engineers can implement directly.
